eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Albany, NY; at 5:57 PM on JUN 28, 2026 Effective until 1:57 AM JUN 29, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Menands Police is looking for a missing 9 year old Aharon Nagi from Park drive Menands, the police department is asking for help from all residents to check their cameras for the last 5 hours, sheds, garages for him. Last seen wearing white shirt brown pants possibly no shoes. Any information contact 518-765-2352 Please check your home security cameras for at least the last 5 hours, any exterior buildings or garages for places he could be hiding out. If you have any information please call 518-765-2352
